title: ranunculus radicans var. multifidus
intro: Ranunculus radicans var. multifidus, also known as the multifid clover buttercup, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Ranunculaceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The multifid clover buttercup is said to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. It can be prepared as a herbal remedy in various forms, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat skin conditions, minor wounds, and respiratory issues.
